description: Sample payloads for testing the AI quiz generation endpoint

payload.paragraph: JavaScript is a high-level programming language that supports object-oriented, imperative, and functional programming styles. It is widely used for web development and can run both in browsers and on servers using Node.js. Key concepts include variables, functions, closures, promises, and async/await.

payload.concepts: Recursion, Dynamic Programming, Time Complexity Analysis

validExamples.name: Using both concepts and paragraph (concepts takes priority)

payload.paragraph: OOP is a programming paradigm based on objects containing data and code.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a for loop in Python?
questions.optionB: To iterate over a sequence of elements

validationRules.concepts: String, optional (but either concepts or paragraph required)
validationRules.paragraph: String, optional (but either concepts or paragraph required)

missingInput.expectedError: Please provide either concepts or a paragraph/topic.

invalidQuestionCount.expectedError: Number of questions must be between 1 and 20.

invalidDifficulty.expectedError: Difficulty must be Easy, Medium, or Hard.

payload.concepts: ← Back Create Quiz Build a quiz manually or import questions from a file.

uiTextPollution.expectedError: Invalid input detected. Please ensure you're entering actual concepts or content, not UI text.

testingInstructions.withCurl: curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/ai/generate-quiz -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN' -d '{"concepts":"Python loops, Functions","paragraph":"","numberOfQuestions":5,"difficulty":"Medium"}'
testingInstructions.withPostman:
1. Create a POST request to http://localhost:5000/api/ai/generate-quiz
2. Add Authorization header with Bearer token
3. Set Content-Type to application/json
4. Use any of the valid example payloads from above
testingInstructions.withFrontend: Make sure the input fields are empty before typing. If you see UI text appearing in the API request, clear your browser cache or try a different browser.
